title: Immediate Food Delivery I
description: Find what percentage of orders are 'immediate' (preferred_delivery_date = order_date). Round to 2 decimal places.
constraints: preferred_delivery_date >= order_date (always same day or later)
Table has at least 1 row — no division by zero
key_concept: AVG of boolean expression * 100 = percentage. Or SUM(CASE WHEN...)/COUNT * 100.

hints.L1: Count immediate orders and divide by total, multiply by 100.
hints.L2: ROUND(100 * AVG(order_date = preferred_delivery_date), 2) — in MySQL, boolean comparison returns 0/1.
hints.L3: SELECT ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN order_date = preferred_delivery_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS immediate_percentage FROM Delivery

optimal_solution: SELECT ROUND(100 * AVG(order_date = preferred_delivery_date), 2) AS immediate_percentage FROM Delivery;
